violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizing solution in wiping cloth bucket was found at 0ppm. Wiping cloths stored in solutions using quaternary ammonia should be maintained according to manufacturer directions. Observed food employee wiping part of a table top, then wiping a chair and then back to the table with the same cloth until the top and chairs were all wiped. Separate cloths should be used for the tops and tables unless top is wiped and then the chairs, then laundered.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Beverage dispenser was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned more thoroughly.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean lids were stored in dirty containers below stainless prep table. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Hand washing sink near the server station was found with an empty sanitizing bucket overturned over the basin. Hand washing sinks should be easily accessible.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Observed employee phone and beverage on shelving unit above prep area. Personal items should be stored separate from food prep areas.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
